facebook.caption:
POV: You took the road toward Gành Gió and found Seana coffee & More.

4.9 stars. 63 reviews. Sitting on a stretch of D. Đông - Cửa Cạn most tourists never reach.

Order something, sit down, and realize this is exactly the kind of place you came to Phu Quoc to find.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Driving past rice fields and wind turbines, then this appears. Seana coffee & More on D. Đông - Cửa Cạn. 4.9 stars and barely any foreign faces. That ratio is everything.

instagram.caption:
POV: You took the wrong road and found a 4.9★ café most tourists drive past.

Seana coffee & More, Gành Gió. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Wind turbines, empty roads, then this café appears. Seana coffee & More hits different when you're the only tourist here.

tiktok.caption: Took a wrong turn near Gành Gió. Found a 4.9★ café. Don't be me, be better. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocCoffee #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

scenes: Empty coastal road, wind turbines spinning
